title: ForgeSMP
description: This is the official ForgeSMP Modpack - ForgeSMP is a multiplayer whitelisted survival Create server focused around the Minecraft mod Create, and other Create mod addons
body:
ForgeSMP is a public (whitelisted), Create mod-focused Minecraft server built for players who love automation, engineering, and building massive contraptions. Whether you're just getting into Create or you're a seasoned factory brain, ForgeSMP has something for you.

**Economy & Progression**
ForgeSMP features a player-driven economy powered by Create: Numismatics, letting you trade, buy, and sell with other players. Complete missions via Create: Missions to earn curency (10 missions per week) and progress through the server's content. Automate ore processing, fuel production, and resource gathering to build up your monoply.

-------

### If you wish to join, please join the discord server to be whitelisted!

-------
All the Create Specific Addons
- Create Goggles
- Create Waystones Recipes
- Create: Bells & Whistles
- Create: Big Contraptions
- Create: Blocks & Bogies
- Create: Broken Bad ReBroken
- Create: Connected
- Create: Copycats+
- Create: Enchantment Industry
- Create: Ender Transmission
- Create: Interactive
- Create: Interiors
- Create: Liquid Fuel
- Create: Missions
- Create: Numismatics
- Create: Pattern Schematics
- Create: Radars
- Create: Renewable Netherite
- Create: Simple Ore Doubling
- Create: Steam 'n' Rails
- Create: The Factory Must Grow
- Create: Totem Factory

- Create: Trimmed
